project: EMIR - 5G-Enhanced Embedded Intelligence for Robotic Autonomy and Smart City Monitoring Application
title: EMIR - Vestavena inteligence s podporou 5G pro autonomii robotu a aplikace pro monitorovani chytrych mest

metadata.agency: Technology Agency of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: 7. verejna soutez - Program prumysloveho vyzkumu a experimentalniho vyvoje TREND

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: EMIR - 5G-Enhanced Embedded Intelligence for Robotic Autonomy and Smart City Monitoring Application

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The project focuses on the use of advanced features of 5G networks (eg slicing) to expand existing and new COGNITECHNA products in order to use existing and gradually expanding standards of 5G (and higher) networks, with a possible contribution to new standards. Some existing solutions of COGNITECHNA s.r.o. Today, they rely on communication via 4G networks and for some data transmission applications only in places where it is possible to connect them via a standard Ethernet cable, or where a dedicated WiFi network is available. The project of enabling the implementation of new functionality, which is currently not possible to provide in the required scope or quality.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Zemcik Pavel, prof. Dr. Ing., dr. h. c. (DCGM) – research leader Juricek Zdenek Ondrej Karel, Ing. (FIT) Skokanova Jana, Mgr. (DFIT-ISD) Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM) Starka Tomas, Ing. (DCGM)
